analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights federal–state cooperation on the COVID-19 response, emphasizing protection of vulnerable populations and provision of testing, medical supplies, and personnel to Arizona. Evaluation by narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not invoked; no reference to historical legacy or values tradition. US2 (admirable society) – Not applicable; no focus on societal groups, civil society, companies, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not present; no adversary is mentioned. US4 (force for good) – Applicable; it frames U.S. government action as helping protect vulnerable people and providing aid, which showcases efforts toward public welfare and security. US5 (great international ally) – Not applicable; this is domestic cooperation, not international alliances. US6 (at the forefront) – Not explicit; while competence is implied, there is no claim of leadership or superiority. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US4.
